Subject: RE:


I got my ticket before the price went up!  You have no idea how much that meant to me.  I”ll have more peace of mind with money while she is here.  With that said, we get paid next Thursday.  Could Bella advance me next week’s check so I have spending money while my Mom is here? She has never been here and I’d like to do a few fun things with her, a show, museums.  Would this be ok?  
 
Again, I can’t thank you enough.  You are truly a wonderfully thoughtful  person.  
 
Catherine
 
From: J. Epstein [mailto:jeeproject@yahoo.com] 
Sent: Tuesday, June 26, 2007 6:16 PM
To: Catherine
Subject: Re:
 
just have bella do it ,, my treat

From: Catherine <catherine@ellmax.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Tuesday, June 26, 2007 5:37:39 PM
Subject: 
Hey you! I wasn't able to thank you for the fun hotel and miami experience. Thank you, always to help you out.

I was wondering, since I don't get paid until next week if I could purchase my mom a ticket to come visit and have bella take it from my check??? It is about $400. This would be a huge help if I could!!

Again, I had fun!!
